overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a medieval European city at dusk. The character moves from a busy market square through cobblestone streets and a covered archway into an open town square, with warm golden-hour lighting and historic architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy medieval market square with green tent

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the crowded market, navigating between pedestrians and carts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside the green canvas tent

entered.detail: large green canvas market tent with circular symbol
wooden cart with wheels and canvas covering
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a bustling medieval market square at dusk. A prominent green canvas tent stands in the center surrounded by wooden carts and scattered NPCs. The cobblestone ground and stone tower establish the historic European setting.

events.description: exits the busy market square into a quieter residential street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone street, passing individual pedestrians

entered.detail: traditional medieval house with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
large stone archway entrance leading to covered passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the crowded market to a quieter residential street lined with half-timbered houses. The cobblestone path continues toward a prominent stone archway in the distance, with fewer pedestrians visible.

events.description: enters the covered stone archway passage
ambient light shifts to warm artificial torchlight inside the archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage, passing a stationary guard

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing against the brick wall

entered.detail: NPC guard wearing plate armor with red and white striped surcoat
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the archway ceiling

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrow covered archway where the natural light gives way to warm artificial torchlight. An armored guard stands against the brick wall to the right as the character moves through the enclosed stone passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with market stalls

events.description: exits the archway into the open town square

agents.ego_description: walking through the open square, approaching market stalls

entered.detail: wooden market stall with red canvas canopy
circular stone structure in the center of the square

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens into a wider town square with market stalls featuring red canopies. The space is more open with scattered pedestrians, and historic buildings line the background under the warm dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling medieval city that transitions from a crowded market into a quiet residential area and finally opens into a wide town square. It begins amidst the activity of a market square featuring a prominent green canvas tent and wooden carts set against a backdrop of stone towers. As the camera follows Geralt, the scene shifts away from the crowds toward a quieter cobblestone street lined with half-timbered houses that lead toward a distant stone archway. The environment then narrows into a covered brick passage where natural dusk light gives way to the warm glow of artificial torchlight and the presence of an armored guard. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into an expansive town square filled with red-canopied stalls and historic buildings under a warm evening sky.
